word: G5476 - χαμαί - chamaí - kham-ah'-ee - On the ground

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: On the ground
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
on the ground, on the earth
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb perhaps from the base of G5490 through the idea of a fissure in the soil; earthward, that is, prostrate: - on (to) the ground.
